item.title: Avenue Supermarts Ltd Surges 3.16% to Day's High of Rs 4556.15 — Outperforms Sector by 0.58 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.31% on 17 Apr 2026, yet Avenue Supermarts Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector peers with a 3.16% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 4556.15. This 0.58 percentage-point outperformance over the Retailing sector’s 2.58% advance highlights a stock-specific strength rather than a broad market lift. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 269.35
item.description: With a sustained six-day rally culminating in a fresh 52-week high of Rs 269.35 on 17 Jun 2026, Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and signalling robust technical alignment across multiple timeframes. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kwality Pharmaceuticals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1760
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Kwality Pharmaceuticals Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1760 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable rally from its 52-week low of Rs 666. This milestone caps a sustained period of price momentum, underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and steady fundamental performance. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sterlite Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 263.95
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Sterlite Technologies Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 263.95 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable rally of over 350% from its 52-week low of Rs 58.51. This milestone reflects a sustained momentum driven by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and consistent price appreciation over the past nine trading sessions. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 449.15 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 161.50 to a fresh high of Rs 449.15 on 17 Jun 2026, Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd has surged an impressive 156% over the past year, outpacing the Sensex which declined marginally by 0.37% during the same period. This remarkable rally is underpinned by a broad alignment of technical indicators signalling sustained momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rekvina Labs Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 43.13
item.description: With a sustained rally over the past eight trading sessions, Rekvina Labs Ltd has surged 17.04% to touch a new 52-week high of Rs 43.13 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone from its 52-week low of Rs 6.75. This price momentum is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators across multiple timeframes, signalling robust upward momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shri Dinesh Mills Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 344
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Shri Dinesh Mills Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 344 on 17 Apr 2026, propelled by a confluence of positive technical signals and robust intraday momentum. This milestone comes amid a volatile trading session where the stock outperformed its sector by 10.82%, signalling renewed investor focus on its price action despite a subdued one-year relative performance. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Dhruva Capital Services Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 324.6
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Dhruva Capital Services Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 324.6 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 85.17% gain over the past year. This milestone underscores a powerful momentum driven by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price strength. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Global Infratech & Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 22.4
item.description: After a remarkable 17-day winning streak, Global Infratech & Finance Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 22.4 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a stunning rally from its 52-week low of Rs 1.73. This extraordinary price momentum has been underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators, signalling robust market enthusiasm for the micro-cap stock. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 89.83
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Integrated Proteins Ltd surged to a new 52-week high of Rs 89.83 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 78.48% gain over this period and an 86.68% return over the past year, significantly outperforming the Sensex's marginal decline of 0.37%. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 15.65
item.description: With a sustained 21-day winning streak culminating in a 50.19% gain, Oxford Industries Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 15.65 on 17 Apr 2026, outpacing its sector by 1.37% and signalling robust price momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shantai Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 70.47
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Shantai Industries Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 70.47 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 373.46% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a sustained 21-day winning streak, underscoring the stock’s robust momentum and technical strength. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Trustedge Capital Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 170
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Trustedge Capital Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 170 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable rally of 275.09% over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained price strength that has outpaced the broader market indices. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Alfavision Overseas (India) Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 16.2
item.description: With a sustained rally over the past 21 trading sessions, Alfavision Overseas (India) Ltd has surged 84.09% to touch a new 52-week high of Rs 16.2 on 17 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable recovery from its 52-week low of Rs 3.65. This price milestone is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and strong price momentum that have propelled the stock well above all key moving averages. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Steelcast Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 299.85
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 299.85 on 17 Jun 2026, Steelcast Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive rally that has delivered nearly 65% returns over the past year. This milestone is underpinned by a confluence of strong technical indicators and sustained price momentum, setting the stock apart in the Castings & Forgings sector. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Integrated Proteins Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil sector, reached a significant milestone on 17 Apr 2026 as its stock price touched an all-time high of Rs.89.83. This achievement marks a remarkable phase in the company’s market journey, reflecting sustained gains and strong price momentum over recent months. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Surges 7.89% to Day's High of Rs 41.43 — Outperforms Sector by 6.28 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.46% on 17 Apr 2026, yet Ola Electric Mobility Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a robust 7.89% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 41.43. This 6.28-percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Trustedge Capital Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Trustedge Capital Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, achieved a significant milestone on 17 Apr 2026 by reaching its all-time high stock price of ₹170.00. This marks a remarkable ascent for the company, reflecting sustained market momentum and robust price performance over multiple time horizons. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd Surges 5.4% to Day's High of Rs 311.35 — Outperforms Sector by 3.82 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.46% on 17 Apr 2026, yet Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.4% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 311.35. This 3.82 percentage-point outperformance over its Construction sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: MMTC Ltd Surges 9.16% to Day's High of Rs 64.23 — Outperforms Sector by 2.07 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.46% on 17 Apr 2026, yet MMTC Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 9.16% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 64.23. This 2.07 percentage-point outperformance over its Trading & Distributors sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 21 minutes ago
